draft.name: Keshav Ramani
draft.subject: JPMorganChase research quality workflow
draft.body:
Hi Keshav Ramani,

I reviewed JPMorganChase's public research footprint and saw strong focus on verification discipline. MiroThinker helps teams keep evidence traceable from source to final recommendation.

If useful, we can run a narrow pilot against one of your current review-heavy workflows and share a before/after quality and turnaround analysis.

Would a short call next week be helpful?

Best,
MiroThinker GTM Team
draft.blog_angle: How JPMorganChase can operationalize verification-first research in high-stakes decisions

approved.qa_notes: approved after retry (missing prospect name; missing company context; email too short; contains hype wording)

draft.name: Murtaza Cherawala
draft.subject: Alexion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. research quality workflow
draft.body:
Hi Murtaza Cherawala,

I noticed your work around compliance, governance, risk. Teams in regulated research use MiroThinker to build verification-first analysis flows with auditable outputs.

Given what Alexion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is doing in this space, a verification-first pilot can make review outcomes more defensible.

Given your role as Head of AI, a short pilot could show whether this reduces review cycles without sacrificing rigor.

Open to a 15-minute walkthrough next week?

Best,
MiroThinker GTM Team
draft.blog_angle: How Alexion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. can operationalize verification-first research in high-stakes decisions
